response.justification: The candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer with strong software craftsmanship, broad language proficiency, and some high-scale systems exposure, but the profile does not match a Principal/IC6 growth-and-experimentation role. There is no evidence of building experimentation or measurement platforms, metrics/telemetry infrastructure, statistical analysis work, or leading multi-team architectural initiatives at the scope this position requires.
strengths: 15+ years of engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded, with polyglot proficiency (TypeScript, Java, C#, C/C++, D)
High-scale, low-latency production experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second
Strong quality culture: TDD, CI/CD, open-source testing tools, and community teaching/workshops
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience
No demonstrated principal-level scope: no evidence of leading multi-workstream initiatives or setting architecture across teams
Limited data/statistics background — no telemetry, metrics infrastructure, or experimental-analysis work

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and scale exposure
